channel.title: etherGTM Blog
channel.description: Outbound, GTM, AI automation, and RevOps playbooks from the etherGTM team.

item.title: Using AI to Qualify Leads Before They Ever Hit Your CRM
item.description: Every unqualified lead that reaches a rep's calendar costs more than the meeting it wastes. Here's how we use AI to filter before, not after, the meeting gets booked.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra

item.title: LinkedIn Outreach Sequences That Convert in 2026
item.description: Connection request, pitch, follow-up — the sequence everyone runs, and the reason it converts worse every year. Here's what we run instead.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra

item.title: RevOps Metrics That Actually Predict Pipeline Health
item.description: Meetings booked is a vanity metric if nothing downstream is tracked. Here are the RevOps metrics that tell you whether outbound is actually working.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra

item.title: Building a GTM Motion That Doesn't Rely on Inbound
item.description: Inbound is a great channel until your category gets crowded or your CAC creeps up. Here's how to build a GTM motion that doesn't wait for someone to find you.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra

item.title: How AI Agents Are Changing B2B Outbound Prospecting
item.description: AI didn't replace outbound reps — it replaced the twelve hours a week they used to spend on research. Here's where the leverage actually shows up.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra

item.title: The Cold Email Deliverability Playbook for 2026
item.description: Why most cold email campaigns die in spam folders, and the exact infrastructure setup we use to keep client domains out of trouble.
item.author: Swapnesh Patra
